# Review Node Schema

Object saved in `data/jobs/<source>/<job_id>/nodes/review/`, indexed by stage.

## Schema

```json
{
  "etapa": "string",       // extract | match | strategy | drafting
  "index": "string",        // Stage-specific locator
  "tipo": "string",         // CORRECTION | AUGMENTATION | STYLE | REJECTION
  "comentario": "string",   // Free text explaining the change
  "valor_anterior": "any",  // Original data generated by LLM
  "valor_nuevo": "any"      // User-corrected data
}
```

## Index Examples

| Stage | Index Format | Example |
|-------|--------------|---------|
| extract | requirement_id or span position | `req_01`, `span_0:10` |
| match | requirement_id vs skill_id | `req_data_analysis:entry_experience_01` |
| drafting | document:paragraph | `cover_letter:intro_paragraph` |

## Type Definitions

- **CORRECTION**: Changes AI-generated data.
- **AUGMENTATION**: Adds new information (e.g., extra evidence link in match).
- **STYLE**: Tone or format adjustment in drafting.
- **REJECTION**: Marks element as invalid or unwanted.

## Pipeline Application

### In Match (Stage 4)

```json
{
  "etapa": "match",
  "index": "req_data_analysis:entry_experience_01",
  "tipo": "AUGMENTATION",
  "comentario": "Add this link because I used Pandas intensively here",
  "valor_anterior": null,
  "valor_nuevo": { "evidence_id": "entry_01", "skill": "Python/Data Analysis" }
}
```

### In Delta/Drafting (Stage 5)

```json
{
  "etapa": "drafting",
  "index": "cover_letter:intro_paragraph",
  "tipo": "STYLE",
  "comentario": "Make it sound less formal",
  "valor_anterior": "Dear Hiring Manager, I am writing to express my interest...",
  "valor_nuevo": "Hi team, when I saw this role, I knew I had to apply..."
}
```

## Final Aggregator (Stage 8)

The system traverses all files in `/review` and constructs "Lessons Learned" context:

```
"In previous stages, the user corrected [comment] in [stage]. 
Make sure to apply this preference in the current generation."
```

## UI Benefit

Side panel of "Correction History" that fetches these JSONs, showing which "instructions" are active in the current pipeline.
